title: Trade journal
subtitle: A running log of setups, outcomes, and lessons. Everything here lives in tradeJournal.json until you connect a database or API.

entries.setup: Reclaim of prior session value with defined risk under the swing low.
entries.lesson: Honored the plan; a scratch beats an undefined loss.

entries.setup: Add your playbook: time of day, catalyst, and invalidation.
entries.lesson: One line on what you would repeat or change next time.
